ddls:
CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* URL to the full-resolution image file */,
  "thumbnail" TEXT /* URL to the thumbnail image file */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the image in pixels */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the image in pixels */,
  "page_no" INTEGER /* Page number of the image within its set */,
  "set_key" TEXT /* Unique key identifying the image set */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the image file in bytes */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was digitized */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last modification date of the image */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the image is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_set_key FOREIGN KEY ("set_key") REFERENCES image_sets ("set_key")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_sets" (
  "set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set */,
  "set_key" TEXT /* Unique key identifying the image set */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image set */,
  "curator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the curator who created the set */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the set was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last modification date of the set */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the set is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_sets_curator_id FOREIGN KEY ("curator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image the metadata belongs to */,
  "artist" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the artwork */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date the artwork was created */,
  "medium" TEXT /* Medium used for the artwork */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Physical dimensions of the original artwork */,
  "copyright_info" TEXT /* Copyright information or rights statements */,
  "provenance" TEXT /* Provenance or history of the artwork */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Current condition of the original artwork */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the metadata is public */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., curator, researcher, public) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the image */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the access attempt was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "virtual_exhibitions" (
  "exhibition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each virtual exhibition */,
  "exhibition_name" TEXT /* Name of the virtual exhibition */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the virtual exhibition */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the virtual exhibition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the virtual exhibition */,
  "curator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the curator who created the exhibition */,
  "featured_image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the featured image for the exhibition */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the exhibition is active */,
  "total_views" INTEGER /* Total number of views for the exhibition */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the exhibition was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exhibition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_virtual_exhibitions_featured_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("featured_image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_virtual_exhibitions_curator_id FOREIGN KEY ("curator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
